title: Speakeasy Organization
description: A Speakeasy organization is the top-level tenancy unit, containing workspaces, billing settings, and member management.

account_type.description: The billing tier for the organization

sso_activated.description: Whether SSO is activated for the organization

sso_connection_id.description: SSO connection identifier if SSO is configured

free_trial_expiry.description: Expiry date of any active free trial

internal.description: Whether this is an internal Speakeasy organization

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the organization was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the organization was last updated
